testcase.name: test_mobile_homepage_loads

error.message: failed on setup with "AttributeError: 'int' object has no attribute 'total_seconds'"

testcase.error: tests/conftest.py:151: in ios_simulator_driver options = _build_ios_options() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:135: in _build_ios_options options.command_timeouts = {"implicit": int(os.getenv("IOS_IMPLICIT_TIMEOUT", "30"))} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test-env/lib/python3.14/site-packages/appium/options/ios/xcuitest/other/command_timeouts_option.py:53: in command_timeouts self.set_capability(COMMAND_TIMEOUTS, {k: int(v.total_seconds() * 1000) for k, v in value.items()}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'int' object has no attribute 'total_seconds'

testcase.name: test_homepage_loads

failure.message: AssertionError: Critical JavaScript errors found: [{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312902881}] assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = len([{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312902881}])

testcase.failure: tests/test_bible_explorer.py:82: in test_homepage_loads assert len(critical_errors) == 0, f"Critical JavaScript errors found: {critical_errors}" E AssertionError: Critical JavaScript errors found: [{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312902881}] E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = len([{'level': 'SEVERE', 'message': 'network - A bad HTTP response code (404) was received when fetching the script.', 'source': 'network', 'timestamp': 1769312902881}])
